steps.title: Read the doubling exponent
steps.content:
The model is
$$f(t)=72{,}000(2)^{\frac{t}{830}}$$
A population doubles when the exponent of $2$ increases by $1$.

steps.title: Find the doubling time
steps.content:
Increasing $t$ by $830$ increases the exponent by $1$.
$$\frac{t+830}{830}=\frac{t}{830}+1$$
So the doubling time is $830$ minutes. The answer is B.
